# Extrude Gaming Studio

Extrude Gaming Studio is an independent mobile game developer creating Android, iOS, and Amazon Appstore games.

Official website: https://raheelswati.github.io/

Important pages:
- Home and game portfolio: https://raheelswati.github.io/
- Edge of Survival: Island Quest: https://raheelswati.github.io/games/edge-of-survival.html
- Boxing Stars: Real 3D Fight: https://raheelswati.github.io/games/boxing-stars.html
- Bistro Empire: Food Tycoon: https://raheelswati.github.io/games/bistro-empire.html
- Flying Panther Crime City: https://raheelswati.github.io/games/flying-panther.html
- Santa Rope Hero: https://raheelswati.github.io/games/santa-rope-hero.html
- ASMR Pop It & Slime Fidgets: https://raheelswati.github.io/games/asmr-pop-it.html
- Racing games: https://raheelswati.github.io/games/racing-games.html
- Support: https://raheelswati.github.io/support.html
- Parents guide: https://raheelswati.github.io/parents-guide.html
- Contact: https://raheelswati.github.io/contact.html
- Privacy policy: https://raheelswati.github.io/privacy-policy.html
- Legacy game archive: https://extrudegaming.wordpress.com/

Official profiles:
- Google Play developer page: https://play.google.com/store/apps/dev?id=4662269381945447072
- App Store developer page: https://apps.apple.com/us/developer/haroon-swati/id1123415467
- Amazon Appstore games: https://www.amazon.com/s?i=mobile-apps&rh=p_4%3AExtrude%2BGaming&search-type=ss
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/ExtrudeGStudio
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@extrudestudio3513

Main games and topics:
- Edge of Survival: Island Quest / Untamed Survival Land: survival, crafting, island adventure
- Boxing Stars: Real 3D Fight: boxing, fighting, sports
- Bistro Empire: Food Tycoon: restaurant tycoon, simulation, idle food game
- Flying Panther Crime City: superhero, open-world action
- Santa Rope Hero: Christmas superhero action
- Girl Spider Rope Hero: rope-swinging superhero action
- ASMR Pop It & Slime Fidgets: relaxing casual ASMR game
- Monster Truck Race 2025: arcade racing
- Dragon Robot Transform Game: robot transformation action

Contact:
- raheelswati1@gmail.com
- extrudegamingstudio@gmail.com
